subcodes.first_line: Praise beseemeth and is befitting unto the Lord of existence and the Sovereign of the seen and unseen, Who through the luminous rays of the Most Great Name hath illumined the realms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک وجود و سلطان غیب و شهود را لایق و سزاست که بانوار اسم اعظم عوالم
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
